name: Dust-Husk Riders
description: A nomadic fleet of highly specialized plant-like species that have adapted to the harsh conditions of the Dust Bowl.

members.name: Moon-Flower Kin
members.biology: Pale, fragile, vine-like humanoids that remain dormant in protective buds during the scorching daylight hours. At night, they bloom with massive, luminescent white flowers that emit a hypnotic, nectarous scent.
members.function: Spiritual and navigational heart of the fleet, responsible for determining the auspicious times for a ship to depart from port.

members.name: Cactus-Kin
members.biology: Hulking, water-retentive bodies covered in iron-hard spines, making them living fortresses.
members.function: Living ballast, responsible for maintaining the vessels and manning the heavy armaments.

members.name: Yucca-Kin
members.biology: Tall, twisted, and fibrous, with a shaggy 'bark' and spiky leaves serving as hair.
members.function: Pilots, responsible for steering the ships by feeling the vibrations of the ground.

members.name: Tumbleweed-Kin
members.biology: Sensory expertise attuned to Motion and Wind, capable of perceiving distant threats, approaching storms, and hidden opportunities carried on the desert currents.
members.function: Scouts, responsible for sensing the intangible and carrying information to the fleet.

philosophy: Trinity of Silence: a philosophy of action that emphasizes trust, instinct, and decisive action.

Insect-Shell Ships.description: Built from the lightweight yet durable shells of massive insects native to the region.
Insect-Shell Ships.function: Lightweight yet durable vessels designed for speed and agility.

Needle-Cannons.description: Heavy cannons that fire clusters of iron-hard spines, manned exclusively by the powerful Cactus-Kin.
